hibernate-mapping.sql-query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM master.dbo.EPRS_VERSION WHERE DB_VERSION LIKE '%wheaton%'
SELECT TOP 1 DB_VERSION FROM master.dbo.EPRS_VERSION where DB_VERSION not like '16.0%' ORDER BY DB_UPDATE_DATE DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM cabinet.dbo.FACILITY_FILE where FACILITY_CODE= :facilityCode and FACILITY_NAME=:facilityName
